message:
fix(wasm-demo): wrap all DOM access in DOMContentLoaded to prevent OrbitControls crash

Fixes browser crash: "Cannot read properties of null (reading 'addEventListener')"
at OrbitControls.connect()

Root cause analysis:
The WASM demo app.js was running ALL initialization code at module top-level:
- Line 740: const threeCanvas = mustGet('three-canvas')
- Line 745: new OrbitControls(camera, threeCanvas)
- Lines 335+: 50+ mustGet() calls for UI elements

All this code executed during module parse BEFORE:
1. DOM elements existed
2. DOMContentLoaded fired
3. HTML finished parsing

OrbitControls.connect() tried to call addEventListener on null canvas element.

Solution:
- Wrapped entire initialization from line 318 to 2077 in initApp() function
- Added DOMContentLoaded check before calling initApp()
- Ensures all DOM access happens AFTER elements exist

Previous fixes attempted:
1. Fixed React SSR hydration (unrelated to this crash)
2. Deferred Monaco editor init (partial fix, didn't catch Three.js)

This fix ensures NOTHING accesses DOM until document is fully ready.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code (https://claude.com/claude-code)
